scope: Search Console, Google Business Profile, Merchant Center, analytics, and public production discovery readback.

platform_envelopes.dataset: property ownership, sitemaps, URL Inspection samples, indexing, performance, enhancements, manual actions, security issues

scope.property_type: domain property preferred; URL-prefix acceptable as secondary

platform_envelopes.aggregation: query, page, country, device, date, search appearance, sitemap, URL inspection samples
limitations: No authenticated Search Console access was available in this task.
No property id, owner, backup owner, sitemap submission status, URL Inspection result, manual action, security issue, or enhancement report was read back.
Public production sitemap/robots fetch currently shows deployed asset mismatch and should be fixed before relying on Search Console diagnostics.

platform_envelopes.dataset: profile ownership, categories, NAP, hours, special hours, website URL, booking URL, services/products, photos, reviews, calls, directions, messages, profile edits
platform_envelopes.aggregation: profile-level diagnostics and local action metrics
limitations: No authenticated Google Business Profile owner access was available in this task.
Public search results show business/citation presence but do not prove ownership, category, diagnostics, review process, local action metrics, or profile health.
C-1 owner fact exceptions remain open.

platform_envelopes.dataset: account ownership, feed source, feed fetch status, item diagnostics, price/availability mismatch, policy issues, product visibility, destination status
limitations: No authenticated Merchant Center access was available in this task.
Local source has a generated Merchant feed, but public fetch of the deployed feed URL returned the Figma Make HTML shell, not RSS XML.
Merchant Center cannot be called ready until the public feed URL returns XML and account diagnostics are read back.

platform_envelopes.dataset: property ownership, consent behavior, events, conversions/key events, landing journeys, attribution, channel definitions, filters, retention, debug stream
platform_envelopes.property: Microsoft Clarity source id xaxi6o0t5o is present in source; authenticated dashboard unavailable; GA4/GTM source not found
platform_envelopes.aggregation: events, sessions, landing routes, consent state, key-event candidates, source/medium if analytics platform supports it
limitations: No authenticated analytics dashboard/API access was available in this task.
Source contains consent-gated Microsoft Clarity helpers, but Clarity is not sufficient by itself for Search Console integration, ecommerce revenue, or booking/order reconciliation.
No GA4, GTM, or dataLayer implementation was found in reviewed source.
D-1 and D-2 contracts must be implemented before key-event reporting is trusted.

platform_envelopes.dataset: field Core Web Vitals, lab diagnostics, URL and origin samples
platform_envelopes.aggregation: origin and representative URL field/lab data
limitations: No PageSpeed or CrUX API/readback was run in this task.
Field data must not be inferred from Lighthouse, build, or local browser tests.

public_fetch_readback.expected: 200 text/plain robots rules pointing to sitemap URLs
public_fetch_readback.impact: Search crawlers and Search Console cannot discover the declared sitemap from robots.txt.

public_fetch_readback.observed: HEAD returned 200 text/html Figma Make shell; body fetch returned 404 during one request
public_fetch_readback.impact: Search Console sitemap submission and crawler sitemap parsing are not reliable.
Product URL discovery through the deployed product sitemap is broken.
Product sitemap children are not being served as XML.
Merchant Center feed fetch will fail or ingest the wrong content.

required_owner_register.minimum_access: verified owner or full user with URL Inspection/API access
required_owner_register.cadence: weekly until launch, then monthly plus release/incident checks

required_owner_register.minimum_access: profile manager with edit and diagnostics access
required_owner_register.cadence: weekly during fact cleanup, then monthly plus hours/review checks

required_owner_register.minimum_access: standard access to feeds, diagnostics, products, destinations, account issues
required_owner_register.cadence: daily during feed launch, then weekly/monthly depending on item churn

required_owner_register.minimum_access: admin/editor for property configuration and debug readback
required_owner_register.cadence: release QA, weekly during launch, monthly governance

gate_result.next_required_task: D-4 - Conversion, SXO, And Accessibility QA
